title: Vietnamese-Style Seafood Baked Buns
description: A delicious and easy-to-make dessert that combines the sweetness of baked buns with the chewiness of sweet and chewy ingredients.
instructions: Preheat the oven to 375°F (190°C). Line a baking sheet with parchment paper.
Cut the sweet buns into seafood shapes using the cookie cutters.
In a small bowl, mix together the chewy sweet sauce and coconut milk.
Dip the sweet bun shapes into the sweet sauce mixture, coating both sides evenly.
Place the coated sweet buns on the prepared baking sheet.
Sprinkle the crushed sugar cookies over the top of the sweet buns.
Bake for 12-15 minutes, or until the sweet buns are golden brown.
Remove from the oven and let cool for a few minutes.
Serve warm, dust with a pinch of salt if desired.
